notes: Fix hometheater-satellite bug: discovery.canonicalizeFromTopology() rewrites any speaker IP that SSDP picked up as a Satellite to the primary's Location IP by walking ZoneGroupTopology's <ZoneGroupMember> tags. parseCoordinatorIP() no longer short-circuits on paired-UUID==coord-UUID (that check was returning the satellite IP as the coord). Also switched the coord's ZoneGroupMember end-scan from '/>' to '>' so a hometheater main's non-self-closing tag doesn't consume its own Satellite children. Grkit hit this because its 'Dining Room' Sonos is a soundbar+satellite setup; every AVTransport call was HTTP 500. Unblocks wizard step 3 volume-changed detection.
